randomquotes.name: Hatred will always burn hotter and brighter than love! RISE! RISE! RISE!
We were paying Nigel Farage £100,000 a month for 1 hour a week BEFORE he even ran for pm!
To make fun putty, mix Styrofoam and Petrol! Keep away from fires!
Legos do not taste good, but they are fun to chew!
You buried us wrong, Mat. We face not love, not safety, not earth, but instead the one who hungers. Weep for us, because through death we were taught to revere the face of eternity.
I think cheese is pretty cool!
